mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_info WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status IN ('WAIT_NEGOTIATION','SCHEDULED','IN_SERVICE','WAIT_BOTH_FINISH','SERVING','FINISHED_PENDING_CONFIRM')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM contact_session WHERE demand_id = #{demandId} AND status IN ('WAIT_FARMER_CONFIRM','WAITING_FARMER_CONFIRM','CONTACT_ACTIVE','NEGOTIATING','CONFIRMED')
